error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try refreshing the page.

calculator.title: Calculate Your Carbon Footprint
calculator.description: Find out your estimated annual CO₂ emissions and get actionable tips to reduce them. It takes less than 3 minutes.

transport.title: Transportation
transport.description: How do you usually get around? Transport makes up a large part of personal carbon footprints.

diet.title: Diet & Food
diet.description: What we eat has a massive impact. Tell us about your average weekly consumption.

home.title: Home Energy
home.description: Your household energy usage is the final major piece of your footprint puzzle.
home.household_size_tip: Home energy emissions are divided equally among household members.
home.electricity_tip: Tip: Check your recent utility bill. Average Indian household uses around 150-250 kWh/month.
home.renewable_tip: What percentage of your electricity comes from solar/wind? (e.g. rooftop solar)

results.title: Your Carbon Footprint
results.description: Here's the breakdown of your estimated annual emissions.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.description: Detailed insights into your carbon footprint
dashboard.no_data_desc: You haven't completed the carbon footprint calculator yet. Complete the assessment to view your personalized dashboard.

coach.title: EcoCoach
coach.subtitle: Your personal sustainability guide
coach.greeting: Hi! I'm EcoCoach 🌱 Your personal sustainability guide.
coach.analysis: I've analyzed your footprint. Your highest emission area is {{category}}. Here are 3 personalized tips tailored just for you:
coach.fallback_response: That's a great question! While I'm just a demo coach right now, taking that first small step makes the biggest difference. You've got this!
